info.description: REST API with Gin, GORM, and Swagger — v1 uses custom query params, v2 uses OData
info.title: Go API V6

get.description: Returns a paginated list of products with optional sorting, filtering, and search

parameters.description: Field name to sort by (e.g. name, price)
parameters.name: sortby

parameters.description: Sort direction: asc or desc (default: asc)
parameters.name: order

parameters.description: Search term matched against product name
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a new product with name and price

get.description: Returns a single product by ID

delete.description: Deletes a product by ID (soft delete via GORM)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users with optional sorting, filtering, and search

parameters.description: Field name to sort by (e.g. name, email)
parameters.name: sortby

parameters.description: Sort direction: asc or desc (default: asc)
parameters.name: order

parameters.description: Search term matched against name and email
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a new user with name and email

get.description: Returns a single user by ID

delete.description: Deletes a user by ID (soft delete via GORM)

get.description: Lists all available entity sets in the v2 API
Returns the EDMX metadata document describing all entity types and their properties
Returns a paginated product collection using OData v4 query options

parameters.description: Sort field and direction (e.g. name asc, price desc)
parameters.name: $orderby

parameters.description: OData filter (e.g. name eq 'Laptop' and price gt 10000, contains(name,'lap'), startswith(name,'L'))
parameters.name: $filter

parameters.description: Search term matched against product name
parameters.name: $search

get.description: Returns the total number of products as plain text
Returns a single product with OData v4 context
Returns a paginated user collection using OData v4 query options

parameters.description: Sort field and direction (e.g. name asc, email desc)
parameters.name: $orderby

parameters.description: Search term matched against name and email
parameters.name: $search

get.description: Returns the total number of users as plain text
Returns a single user with OData v4 context
Lists all available entity sets in the v6 API
Returns the EDMX metadata document describing all entity types and their properties
Returns a paginated PO collection using OData query options
Returns the total number of POs as plain text
Returns a single PO with OData context
Returns a paginated user collection using OData query options

parameters.description: Search term matched against name and email
parameters.name: $search

get.description: Returns the total number of users as plain text
Returns a single user with OData v4 context
Returns a paginated vendor collection using OData query options

post.description: Creates a new vendor from full JSON payload

get.description: Returns the total number of vendors as plain text
Returns a single vendor with OData context

valid.description: Valid is true if Time is not NULL
